name: Curve Dental Practice Management API
what_it_does: Curve Dental REST API for cloud-native dental practice management software. Enables AI agents to manage patient records and appointments, retrieve treatment planning and procedure data, access insurance and billing information, manage provider schedules, integrate with dental imaging systems, handle patient communication workflows, and connect dental practice data with external analytics and patient engagement platforms.
use_cases: Managing patient appointment scheduling from dental workflow automation agents
Retrieving patient treatment history for clinical coordination agents
Processing insurance eligibility and claims from dental billing agents
Sending appointment reminders from patient communication agents
not_for: Non-dental healthcare without dental-specific patient workflow management
Large health system dental networks requiring enterprise EMR integration
Specialty dental practices without general dentistry practice management focus
best_when: A dental practice, group practice, or DSO (dental service organization) using Curve Dental wants AI agents to automate scheduling, patient communication, insurance processing, and clinical coordination workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient dental records are Protected Health Information (PHI). All integrations must comply with HIPAA Security Rule. Business Associate Agreement (BAA) required.

auth.notes: Curve Dental uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Practice-level credentials. Partner program for integration developers. BAA required for HIPAA compliance. API available to certified integration partners.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — dental practice management SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing for practices; DSO enterprise pricing for groups
pricing.notes: Provo, Utah company. Cloud-native dental PM founded 2004. Strong in DSO and group practice segment. 65,000+ dental professionals. Competes with Dentrix and Open Dental for cloud-native practices.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Patient dental records are PHI — BAA required for all integrations
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner certification
No webhooks — requires polling for appointment and schedule updates
Partner certification required for production API access
US data residency only — verify for dental groups with international operations
Cloud-only platform — no on-premises option (unlike Open Dental)
agent_readiness.security_notes: HIPAA: Patient dental PHI. SOC2. OAuth2 with practice-level scoping. BAA required. US data residency only. Cloud-native with strong security posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient dental PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. BAA required. US data residency only.
